mapper.sql: select story_id, title, summary, cover_url, content, status, sort, publish_time, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, view_count, like_count, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from hx_story
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and create_by like concat('%', #{createBy}, '%')
order by sort asc, publish_time desc, create_time desc
where del_flag = '0' and status = '1' order by sort asc, publish_time desc, create_time desc

select s.story_id, s.title, s.summary, s.cover_url, s.content, s.status, s.sort, s.publish_time, s.publish_user_id, s.publish_user_name, s.view_count, s.like_count, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from hx_story s inner join hx_story_like l on s.story_id = l.story_id where l.user_id = #{userId} and s.del_flag = '0' order by l.create_time desc
mapper.update: update hx_story set view_count = ifnull(view_count, 0) + 1 where story_id = #{storyId} and del_flag = '0'
update hx_story set like_count = ifnull(like_count, 0) + 1 where story_id = #{storyId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update hx_story set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where story_id = #{storyId}
